title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: Yes, it should materially improve approval likelihood: the prior rejection was explicitly due to missing system context, threat model, and decision criteria (`agent-glm-general-reviewer.json`), while the refined framing adds concrete scope (`/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator`), task family/phase, non-edit constraints, and expected output shape, which makes risk review actionable instead of speculative. The remaining non-content risk is runtime availability (live lane/auth health), not prompt quality.
